title: Golden Days Music
description: Reverts biome-dependent music to focus on original C418 tracks.
body:
# Golden Days Music

This is a simple tweak pack in the same realm as Golden Days itself which focuses on Nostalgia. Begone biome dependent music! (Only exception being C418 underwater tracks, in which case also has an added chance to play normal music)

The music selection used in the pack is the random music included in the game as of the 2013 Music Update, minus the title screen music from Volume Beta.

Report any issues to my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/pYH6rd6).
